Please note: this site uses automated translation technology. We cannot guarantee 100% accuracy, and some elements cannot be translated. Thank you!

Find Food Near You

If you’re struggling to afford the food you and your family need, we’re here to help. While Food Bank for the Heartland does not distribute food directly from our warehouse, we offer multiple ways to easily secure food. Call our SNAP/Food Resources Hotline Our SNAP Outreach Team can help you find a pantry or apply for SNAP benefits. Nebraska residents: call 1-855-444-5556. Iowa residents: call 1-855-944-3663. Learn more here. Use our interactive map below Browse the map or enter your zip code in the search bar below to find food resources near you. Click on a location icon or listing for additional details. For additional support, including non-food resources, please call 211.

January 27, 2023 update: Quickly changing Winter weather is impacting some of the resources shown on the map below. We will make every effort to update each location with the latest information, but some mobile pantry distributions may be canceled due to weather.

    DOWNLOAD SPANISH PDF

    Call our SNAP/Food Resource Hotline

    Food Bank for the Heartland’s SNAP Outreach team can help you find a pantry, walk you through the SNAP (formerly Food Stamps) application process, and access additional community resources. Se habla Español.

    Nebraska

    1-855-444-5556

    Mon–Fri: 8am–6pm
    Iowa

    1-855-944-3663

    Mon–Fri: 8am–5pm
    Learn more about SNAP

    This institution is an equal opportunity provider. View the full USDA Nondiscrimination Statement here.

    FoodBankHeartland.org
    FeedingAmerica.org

    Office and Warehouse
    4645 S. 84th Street
    Omaha, NE, 68127

    P: 402.331.1213
    E: Info@FoodBankHeartland.org

    EIN: 47-0637701

    Please note: this site uses automated translation technology. We cannot guarantee 100% accuracy, and some elements cannot be translated. Thank you!

    Find Food Near You

    If you’re struggling to afford the food you and your family need, we’re here to help. While Food Bank for the Heartland does not distribute food directly from our warehouse, we offer multiple ways to easily secure food. Call our SNAP/Food Resources Hotline Our SNAP Outreach Team can help you find a pantry or apply for SNAP benefits. Nebraska residents: call 1-855-444-5556. Iowa residents: call 1-855-944-3663. Learn more here. Use our interactive map below Browse the map or enter your zip code in the search bar below to find food resources near you. Click on a location icon or listing for additional details. For additional support, including non-food resources, please call 211.

    January 27, 2023 update: Quickly changing Winter weather is impacting some of the resources shown on the map below. We will make every effort to update each location with the latest information, but some mobile pantry distributions may be canceled due to weather.

      Looking to connect others with food?

      Download our Food Resources flyer.

      DOWNLOAD ENGLISH PDF
      DOWNLOAD SPANISH PDF

      Call our SNAP/Food Resource Hotline

      Food Bank for the Heartland’s SNAP Outreach team can help you find a pantry, walk you through the SNAP (formerly Food Stamps) application process, and access additional community resources. Se habla Español.

      Nebraska

      1-855-444-5556

      Mon–Fri: 8am–6pm
      Iowa

      1-855-944-3663

      Mon–Fri: 8am–5pm
      Learn more about SNAP

      This institution is an equal opportunity provider. View the full USDA Nondiscrimination Statement here.

      FoodBankHeartland.org
      FeedingAmerica.org

      Office and Warehouse
      4645 S. 84th Street
      Omaha, NE, 68127

      P: 402.331.1213
      E: Info@FoodBankHeartland.org

      EIN: 47-0637701

      Please note: this site uses automated translation technology. We cannot guarantee 100% accuracy, and some elements cannot be translated. Thank you!

      Find Food Near You

      If you’re struggling to afford the food you and your family need, we’re here to help. While Food Bank for the Heartland does not distribute food directly from our warehouse, we offer multiple ways to easily secure food. Call our SNAP/Food Resources Hotline Our SNAP Outreach Team can help you find a pantry or apply for SNAP benefits. Nebraska residents: call 1-855-444-5556. Iowa residents: call 1-855-944-3663. Learn more here. Use our interactive map below Browse the map or enter your zip code in the search bar below to find food resources near you. Click on a location icon or listing for additional details. For additional support, including non-food resources, please call 211.

      January 27, 2023 update: Quickly changing Winter weather is impacting some of the resources shown on the map below. We will make every effort to update each location with the latest information, but some mobile pantry distributions may be canceled due to weather.

        West Central Community Action Harlan
        Food Pantry
        Requirements: Photo ID, Social Security card, proof of residency, TEFAP form if applicable (no ID required to receive USDA/TEFAP food).

        1017 7th St, Harlan, IA 51537
        (712) 755-5602

        107 N 4th Ave, Logan, IA 51546
        (712) 644-3388

        Looking to connect others with food?

        Download our Food Resources flyer.

        DOWNLOAD ENGLISH PDF
        DOWNLOAD SPANISH PDF

        Call our SNAP/Food Resource Hotline

        Food Bank for the Heartland’s SNAP Outreach team can help you find a pantry, walk you through the SNAP (formerly Food Stamps) application process, and access additional community resources. Se habla Español.

        Nebraska

        1-855-444-5556

        Mon–Fri: 8am–6pm
        Iowa

        1-855-944-3663

        Mon–Fri: 8am–5pm
